subject: Golbat, a large blue bat Pokemon with enormous wide-open mouth and large fangs, wings fully spread
description: A large blue bat creature hovers with wings fully spread, its enormous mouth gaping open to display large white fangs and a dark throat. The creature's body is round and blue with visible ears and small eyes, and its wings are membranous and darkly colored. Behind it, a stormy night sky crackles with lightning bolts, with dark clouds creating a dramatic and threatening atmosphere. The composition places the creature front-and-center against the turbulent sky, emphasizing its intimidating open-mouthed display. The overall color palette is dark blues and purples with bright white lightning accents.
foreground: large blue bat creature with wings spread and mouth open showing fangs
background: stormy night sky with lightning bolts and dark storm clouds
emotion: aggressive and threatening, mouth wide open in attack display
